findings.short_text: The largest risk category is moderate; 909 objects fall there.
findings.technical_basis: Risk categories are counted from the current risk_scores table.
findings.title: Most objects concentrate in moderate priority

findings.short_text: 21 objects are currently elevated or above, keeping the highest-priority review list compact.
findings.technical_basis: Elevated objects are risk_category in elevated, high or critical.
findings.title: Elevated priority objects are a focused review set

findings.short_text: Among the highest-ranked objects, physical size and orbital proximity are the dominant components.
findings.technical_basis: Dominant components are counted across the top 20 rows by risk_score_0_100.
findings.title: Top-ranked objects are driven by physical and orbital factors

findings.caveat: The score is an analytical priority score, not an official impact probability.
findings.technical_basis: Top object is selected by descending risk_score_0_100.
findings.title: The current top object is review-worthy within this experimental score
